title: digital-passes — published events
description: Apple Wallet + Google Wallet + generic QR passes. Wraps spatie/laravel-mobile-pass v1. Push updates dispatched via APNs + FCM.

events.name: PassIssued
events.trigger: New WalletPass row. Provider selected (apple / google / generic_qr). Signed JWT QR payload minted.

events.name: PassInstalled
events.trigger: Wallet reports the pass was added to the user's wallet.

events.name: PassUpdated
events.trigger: Pass re-minted (membership renewal, branding change). APNs/FCM push dispatched.

events.name: PassRemovedByUser
events.trigger: User removed the pass from their wallet (spatie webhook).

events.name: PassRevoked
events.trigger: P1 event. Pass revoked — lost / stolen / membership cancelled / security. Push-notify device.

events.name: PassExpired
events.trigger: Pass validity ended (membership expired). Auto-marked expired.

events.name: PassScanned
events.trigger: QR scanned at credentials gate. Forwarded to attendance module.
